productDisplayName: Mother Earth Women Printed Red Top
description: Composition Red and cream printed sleeveless top made of blended cotton fabric, has a round neck, half buttoned placket, satin piping at the neck and arm holes and satin loops and belt at the midriff Fit Regular Wash care Hand wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent as colour may bleed Flat dry inside out in shade Warm iron This mother earth top epitomises how fashion, vintage styling and comfort unite to create perfect Indianwear. Mother Earth uses hand processed fabrics including natural and Azo free dyes and this piece is woven with slub yarns for an authentic vintage feel. Those interested in colour blocking can wear this with bright contrasting capris or pants. Others, who want to keep their look classic and chic, can pair this with denims, and embellished slippers. Model statistics The product is a size L on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
